title: Resume e2e hardening
goal: Harden resume with a black-box interrupted-run scenario that resumes remaining slices without duplicate merges.
acceptance: A daemon integration test interrupts a run after a checkpoint.
resume --run continues remaining slices from the integration branch.
Previously merged slices are not merged a second time.
must_ask_if: The slice requires changing the JSON-only worker result contract incompatibly.
The implementation would remove existing CLI/daemon commands.
Acceptance criteria conflict with the Khazad-Doom rule: You shall not slop.
